user.title: Trafiklab
user.description: Set up your Trafiklab integration to get public transport information.

departure_arrival.title: Configure Stop Sensor
departure_arrival.description: Choose filters and update settings for this stop sensor.

data.line_filter: Line Filter (comma-separated; empty for all lines)
data.direction: Destination Filter (substring; empty for all destinations)
data.update_condition: Update Condition (template; render to 'true' to fetch)

data_description.transport_modes: Leave empty to show all modes.

resrobot.title: Resrobot Travel Search
resrobot.description: Configure origin and destination for Resrobot trips.

data.max_trip_duration: Maximum Trip Duration (minutes, leave empty for no limit)

data_description.transport_modes: Leave empty to include all modes. Note: if set, walk and transfer legs will be excluded from results.

data.line_filter: Line Filter (comma-separated, leave empty for all lines)
data.direction: Destination Filter (substring; leave empty for all destinations)
data.update_condition: Update Condition (template; render to 'true' to fetch)

data_description.transport_modes: Leave empty to show all modes.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Stop Sensor
reconfigure.description: Update the API key or stop ID for this sensor.

reconfigure_resrobot.title: Reconfigure Resrobot Travel Search
reconfigure_resrobot.description: Update the API key or trip endpoints for this sensor.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Trafiklab API

abort.already_configured: This sensor configuration is already configured

init.title: Update Stop Sensor Settings
init.description: Adjust filters and timing for this stop sensor.

data.line_filter: Line Filter (comma-separated, leave empty for all lines)
data.direction: Destination Filter (substring; leave empty for all destinations)
data.update_condition: Update Condition (template; render to 'true' to fetch)

data_description.transport_modes: Leave empty to show all modes.

init_resrobot.title: Update Resrobot Travel Search Settings
init_resrobot.description: Adjust filters and timing for this Resrobot sensor.

data.max_trip_duration: Maximum Trip Duration (minutes, leave empty for no limit)

data_description.transport_modes: Leave empty to include all modes. Note: if set, walk and transfer legs will be excluded from results.
